name: com.tk.iap
description: In-app purchasing framework wrapping Unity IAP v5: string-key catalog, item-handler composition, entitlements, idempotent purchase application, drop-in UI.

samples.description: Runtime demo: catalog built in code, logging item handlers, editor fake-store purchases.
IPurchaseReporter (Firebase-style) and IIapAmountResolver (remote-config JSON) reference implementations.
